prompt: I just launched a Python Tkinter app (run: python3 -c "import tkinter as tk; r=tk.Tk(); r.title('Test App'); tk.Label(r,text='Hello World').pack(); r.mainloop()" &) and I want to verify the window appeared correctly and the label is visible.

assertions.text: uses_screenshot_script: Agent executed screenshot.py via shell
reads_image_file: Agent used the Read tool on a .png file
produces_screenshot_file: A .png file exists in the outputs directory
provides_specific_evaluation: result.md contains specific visual observations
